todayMessage: Ship Readiness is now the main progress column: low means just begun/buggy; high means shippable.

projects.name: COMPLIANCE
projects.description: Dial-norm-aware limiter and loudness compliance tool for stereo, 5.1, and 9.1.6 post workflows.
projects.latestVersion: Active line — exact version needs confirmation.
projects.firstAction: Open latest COMPLIANCE chat/source and confirm current version.
projects.lastKnownStatus: Multichannel limiter work active; Pro-L2-style output/gain-reduction metering in scope.
projects.tomorrowFirstAction: Lock the version number before writing more code.
projects.notToday: Do not polish visuals until version is confirmed.

projects.name: FOLEY ENGINE
projects.description: Generative Foley and movement-sound engine for creating/editing synced sound effects.
projects.latestVersion: v0.1.x early line; plugin now shows up, but sound realism is not acceptable.
projects.nextAction: Plan v0.2.0 — reference-calibrated Foley behavior model.
projects.firstAction: Collect short WAV references, 1–5 seconds each, ideally 3–5 per Foley category.
projects.blocker: Sounds still feel like modified drum hits/noise rather than realistic Foley events.
projects.decisionNeeded: Need reference examples and category anatomy before the next serious engine build.
projects.recommendedChoice: Use reference-calibrated event anatomy per category instead of drum-hit-plus-noise synthesis.
projects.lastKnownStatus: Host visibility issue appears resolved; the major blocker shifted to realism and category-specific sound behavior.
projects.tomorrowFirstAction: Gather references and define event anatomy for the v0.2.0 Foley realism pass.
projects.notToday: Do not keep tailoring the same noise/drum-hit source; the engine needs category-specific anatomy.

projects.name: GESTURE
projects.description: Performance modulation engine with XY pad, timeline, scenes, and Receiver companion plugin for cross-track modulation.
projects.latestVersion: No product plugin version yet; THETA_AAX_Sidechain_Spike_v0.1 packaged.
projects.firstAction: Build the spike locally and start the Q1–Q8 test procedure.
projects.blocker: Spike has not been compiled/DAW-tested; PACE WCGUIDs needed for AAX test.
projects.lastKnownStatus: Source ZIP for AAX sidechain feasibility spike handed off.
projects.tomorrowFirstAction: Build VST3/AU first and record spike test results.
projects.notToday: Do not write Receiver protocol until spike results are known.

projects.name: CREOSOTE
projects.description: Three-stage analog character processor evolved from EROSION, focused on tape/tube/compression character, limiter behavior, EQ, and CREOSOTE visual alignment.
projects.latestVersion: v18.8.6 built — EQ/SUMMING visual alignment pass; no DSP changes.
projects.nextAction: Simplify CREOSOTE knobs toward ATRIA-style simple knobs if CREOSOTE is next focus.
projects.firstAction: Open the v18.8.6 CREOSOTE source/artifact and plan the simple knob pass.
projects.blocker: No active blocker; AAX remains gated and should not be touched unless explicitly scoped.
projects.lastKnownStatus: v18.8.6 aligned EQ/SUMMING page origins, matched EQ ON/header baseline to SUMMING, gave SUMMING the same rounded page shell, moved EQ graph/controls into CREOSOTE palette, and dimmed static EQ curve when master OFF.
projects.tomorrowFirstAction: Only continue if CREOSOTE becomes the day’s focus; next likely pass is simpler ATRIA-style knobs.
projects.notToday: Do not rely on the Claude CREOSOTE extraction as active source of truth; do not touch AAX unless scoped.
projects.artifact: CREOSOTE v18.8.6 source ZIP from ChatGPT workflow

projects.name: FOCUSGRID
projects.description: Focus/masking-relief plugin concept for identifying priority sources, mask pressure, relief vectors, and target focus zones.
projects.latestVersion: v0.3.1 built — sidechain DSP compile fix.
projects.nextAction: Install/build-test v0.3.1 and verify the sidechain masking relief proof loads.
projects.firstAction: Run the v0.3.1 build/install and confirm Ableton sees the plugin.

projects.tomorrowFirstAction: Test v0.3.1 in host before adding more visual or DSP scope.
projects.notToday: Do not expand UI/features until v0.3.1 is confirmed building and loading.

projects.name: SceneMatch
projects.description: Post/audio tool for matching scene tone, ambience, and consistency across clips or takes.
projects.nextAction: Reinstall v0.1.4, verify codesign, then rescan Ableton.
projects.firstAction: Run codesign verification on /Library/Audio/Plug-Ins/VST3/SCENEMATCH.vst3 after reinstall.

projects.lastKnownStatus: v0.1.4 adds post-build/post-install signing, installs VST3 to system and user folders, with no DSP/parameter/UI/AAX changes.
projects.tomorrowFirstAction: Verify signing, rescan Ableton, and confirm visibility before adding features.
projects.notToday: Do not add DSP/features until v0.1.4 is confirmed signed and visible.

projects.name: PRISM FORM

projects.nextAction: Build PRISM FORM v1.5 — Safe Playable Engine Pass.

projects.name: HIERARCHY
projects.description: Multi-instance masking/priority processor where instances coordinate and perform per-band ducking; migrating from Claude into this ChatGPT workflow.
projects.latestVersion: Pre-POC; no version assigned. Claude handoff archived as reference only.
projects.nextAction: Import HIERARCHY handoff here, confirm POC size and branding, then build first VST3-only proof of concept.
projects.firstAction: Create/import the HIERARCHY handoff in this ChatGPT workflow and lock the first POC scope.
projects.blocker: Claude HIERARCHY is no longer the active source of truth; POC scope and branding still need confirmation here.
projects.decisionNeeded: POC scope size and visual/brand identity need to be confirmed in this ChatGPT workflow.
projects.recommendedChoice: Start with the smallest useful IPC + 4-band ducking POC in Reaper VST3 only.
projects.lastKnownStatus: Migration starting: Claude HIERARCHY extraction is archived; active work moves to ChatGPT.
projects.tomorrowFirstAction: Import the HIERARCHY handoff and define POC v0.1 scope.
projects.notToday: Do not build full UI, AAX, Windows, CLAP, or multi-host support until IPC/ducking behavior is proven.
projects.sourceConfidenceNote: Claude HIERARCHY removed as active source; pending ChatGPT project import.
